import { EXTENSION_MANAGER_EXTENSION_ID } from "./constants.js";
const key = (suffix) => `${EXTENSION_MANAGER_EXTENSION_ID}.${suffix}`;
export const emLabel = (suffix, defaultMessage, description) => ({
    key: key(suffix),
    defaultMessage,
    description,
});
export const extensionManagerLabels = {
    manifestDisplayName: emLabel("manifest.displayName", "Extension Manager"),
    manifestDescription: emLabel("manifest.description", "Manage installed and built-in extensions."),
    commandOpenTitle: emLabel("commands.open.title", "Open Extension Manager"),
    commandOpenDescription: emLabel("commands.open.description", "Open extension tools."),
    commandOpenQuickTitle: emLabel("commands.quick.title", "Open Extension Quick Actions"),
    commandOpenQuickDescription: emLabel("commands.quick.description", "Open quick extension actions."),
    viewTitle: emLabel("views.manager.title", "Extension Manager"),
    viewDescription: emLabel("views.manager.description", "Browse, turn on, and set up extensions."),
    modalTitle: emLabel("views.modal.title", "Extension Quick Actions"),
    modalDescription: emLabel("views.modal.description", "Quick extension stats and actions."),
    railTitle: emLabel("rail.title", "Extensions"),
    settingsTitle: emLabel("settings.title", "Extension Manager Preferences"),
    settingsDisplayTitle: emLabel("settings.sections.display.title", "Display"),
    settingsDisplayDescription: emLabel("settings.sections.display.description", "Set the default view density."),
    showCompatibilityLabel: emLabel("settings.fields.showCompatibilityByDefault.label", "Show compatibility details by default"),
    showCompatibilityDescription: emLabel("settings.fields.showCompatibilityByDefault.description", "Expand compatibility information for each extension when the manager opens."),
    showDiagnosticsLabel: emLabel("settings.fields.showDiagnosticsByDefault.label", "Show diagnostics by default"),
    showDiagnosticsDescription: emLabel("settings.fields.showDiagnosticsByDefault.description", "Expand runtime diagnostics for each extension when the manager opens."),
    headerTitle: emLabel("view.header.title", "Extension Manager"),
    headerSubtitle: emLabel("view.header.subtitle", "Extension list, status, and settings."),
    paneTreeTitle: emLabel("view.tree.title", "Extension Browser"),
    paneTreeExtensions: emLabel("view.tree.extensions", "Runtime Extensions"),
    paneTreeCatalog: emLabel("view.tree.catalog", "Catalog Entries"),
    paneTreeChip: emLabel("view.tree.chip", "Extension browser"),
    paneTreeFilterPlaceholder: emLabel("view.tree.filter.placeholder", "Filter extensions or catalog entries"),
    paneTreeFilterAria: emLabel("view.tree.filter.aria", "Filter extension browser"),
    paneTreeFilterAll: emLabel("view.tree.filter.all", "ALL"),
    paneTreeFilterExtensions: emLabel("view.tree.filter.extensions", "EXT"),
    paneTreeFilterCatalog: emLabel("view.tree.filter.catalog", "CAT"),
    paneTreeInstalledSuffix: emLabel("view.tree.installedSuffix", "INSTALLED"),
    paneTreeCatalogSuffix: emLabel("view.tree.catalogSuffix", "CATALOG"),
    paneTreeExtensionsEmpty: emLabel("view.tree.extensions.empty", "No extensions match the current browser filter."),
    paneTreeCatalogEmpty: emLabel("view.tree.catalog.empty", "No catalog entries match the current browser filter."),
    paneQuickModal: emLabel("view.actions.quickModal", "ACTIONS"),
    actionExit: emLabel("view.actions.exit", "Exit"),
    actionClose: emLabel("view.actions.close", "Close"),
    actionImport: emLabel("view.actions.import", "Import Package"),
    actionExport: emLabel("view.actions.export", "Export Catalog"),
    actionRemove: emLabel("view.actions.remove", "Remove Installed Package"),
    statsExtensions: emLabel("view.stats.extensions", "Extensions"),
    statsActive: emLabel("view.stats.active", "Active"),
    statsDisabled: emLabel("view.stats.disabled", "Disabled"),
    statsIncompatible: emLabel("view.stats.incompatible", "Incompatible"),
    quickActionsTitle: emLabel("view.quick.title", "Quick Actions"),
    importTitle: emLabel("view.import.title", "Portable Package Import"),
    importDescription: emLabel("view.import.description", "Import a portable extension package artifact, register it in the runtime catalog, and install it immediately."),
    catalogEntriesTitle: emLabel("view.catalog.title", "Available Catalog Entries"),
    catalogBrowserTitle: emLabel("view.catalog.browserTitle", "Catalog Browser"),
    runtimeExtensionsTitle: emLabel("view.runtime.title", "Runtime Extensions"),
    emptyTreeSelection: emLabel("view.emptySelection", "Select an extension or catalog entry from the browser tree."),
    emptyCatalog: emLabel("view.emptyCatalog", "No catalog entries are available."),
    sourceBundled: emLabel("view.card.source.bundled", "Bundled"),
    sourceInstalled: emLabel("view.card.source.installed", "Installed"),
    actionEnable: emLabel("view.card.actions.enable", "Enable"),
    actionDisable: emLabel("view.card.actions.disable", "Disable"),
    actionActivate: emLabel("view.card.actions.activate", "Activate"),
    actionDeactivate: emLabel("view.card.actions.deactivate", "Deactivate"),
    labelPackage: emLabel("view.card.labels.package", "Package"),
    labelEntryId: emLabel("view.card.labels.entryId", "Entry ID"),
    labelCatalogId: emLabel("view.card.labels.catalogId", "Catalog ID"),
    labelVersion: emLabel("view.card.labels.version", "Version"),
    labelActivation: emLabel("view.card.labels.activation", "Activation"),
    labelEnabled: emLabel("view.card.labels.enabled", "Enabled"),
    labelPermissions: emLabel("view.card.labels.permissions", "Permissions"),
    labelCompatibility: emLabel("view.card.labels.compatibility", "Compatibility"),
    labelHealth: emLabel("view.card.labels.health", "Health & diagnostics"),
    labelSettings: emLabel("view.card.labels.settings", "Settings"),
    stateEnabled: emLabel("view.card.state.enabled", "yes"),
    stateDisabled: emLabel("view.card.state.disabled", "no"),
    compatibilityOk: emLabel("view.card.compatibility.ok", "Compatible with the current host, runtime, and theme contract."),
    compatibilityError: emLabel("view.card.compatibility.error", "One or more compatibility issues were detected."),
    noDiagnostics: emLabel("view.card.health.noDiagnostics", "No runtime diagnostics recorded."),
    lastError: emLabel("view.card.health.lastError", "Last error"),
    settingsEnabled: emLabel("settings.form.state.enabled", "Enabled"),
    settingsDisabled: emLabel("settings.form.state.disabled", "Disabled"),
    settingsShortcutKicker: emLabel("settings.shortcut.kicker", "Extension manager"),
    settingsShortcutTitle: emLabel("settings.shortcut.title", "Extension Manager"),
    settingsShortcutDescription: emLabel("settings.shortcut.description", "Open extension tools and status."),
    settingsStatsExtensions: emLabel("settings.stats.extensions", "EXTENSIONS"),
    settingsStatsActive: emLabel("settings.stats.active", "ACTIVE"),
    settingsStatsInstalled: emLabel("settings.stats.installed", "INSTALLED"),
    settingsStatsCatalog: emLabel("settings.stats.catalog", "CATALOG"),
    settingsChipIndexedDb: emLabel("settings.chips.indexeddb", "INDEXEDDB"),
    settingsChipPaneOnly: emLabel("settings.chips.paneOnly", "Pane only"),
    settingsChipSplitSingle: emLabel("settings.chips.splitSingle", "SPLIT + SINGLE"),
    settingsChipSettingsContent: emLabel("settings.chips.settingsContent", "Settings content"),
    settingsChipEnglishFallback: emLabel("settings.chips.englishFallback", "English fallback"),
    settingsOpenManager: emLabel("settings.actions.openManager", "Open manager"),
    actionInstall: emLabel("view.actions.install", "INSTALL"),
    actionUpdate: emLabel("view.actions.update", "UPDATE"),
    actionInspect: emLabel("view.actions.inspect", "INSPECT"),
    toolbarLabel: emLabel("toolbar.label", "Extension Manager toolbar"),
    toolbarToggleSidebar: emLabel("toolbar.toggleSidebar", "Toggle sidebar"),
    toolbarSinglePane: emLabel("toolbar.singlePane", "Single pane"),
    toolbarSplitScreen: emLabel("toolbar.splitScreen", "Split screen"),
    toolbarImportPackage: emLabel("toolbar.importPackage", "Import extension package"),
    toolbarExportCatalog: emLabel("toolbar.exportCatalog", "Export catalog snapshot"),
    toolbarClose: emLabel("toolbar.close", "Close manager"),
    toolbarResizePanes: emLabel("toolbar.resizePanes", "Resize Extension Manager panes"),
    errorInvalidPortableArtifact: emLabel("errors.invalidPortableArtifact", "Invalid portable extension package artifact."),
    errorImportFailed: emLabel("errors.importFailed", "Failed to import extension package."),
    errorInstallFailed: emLabel("errors.installFailed", "Failed to install extension."),
    errorRemoveFailed: emLabel("errors.removeFailed", "Failed to remove installed extension."),
    readyDiagnostic: emLabel("diagnostics.ready", "Extension Manager activated successfully."),
};
export const extensionManagerLocaleLoader = {
    defaultLocale: "en",
    fallbackLocale: "en",
    loaders: {
        en: async () => (await import("./locales/en.js")).extensionManagerEnCatalog,
        es: async () => (await import("./locales/es.js")).extensionManagerEsCatalog,
    },
};
//# sourceMappingURL=i18n.js.map

import { extensionManagerLabels } from "../i18n.js";
export const extensionManagerEnCatalog = {
    locale: "en",
    messages: {
        ...Object.fromEntries(Object.values(extensionManagerLabels).map((label) => [label.key, label.defaultMessage])),
        "manifest.displayName": "Extension Manager",
        "manifest.description": "Bundled operator console for browsing, enabling, disabling, diagnosing, and configuring extensions.",
        "commands.open.title": "Open Extension Manager",
        "commands.open.description": "Open the bundled extension operator console.",
        "views.manager.title": "Extension Manager",
        "views.manager.description": "Browse installed extensions, toggle enablement, inspect permissions, and edit extension settings.",
        "rail.title": "Extensions",
        "settings.title": "Extension Manager Preferences",
        "settings.sections.display.title": "Display",
        "settings.sections.display.description": "Controls the default information density for the extension manager.",
        "settings.fields.showCompatibilityByDefault.label": "Show compatibility details by default",
        "settings.fields.showCompatibilityByDefault.description": "Expand compatibility information for each extension when the manager opens.",
        "settings.fields.showDiagnosticsByDefault.label": "Show diagnostics by default",
        "settings.fields.showDiagnosticsByDefault.description": "Expand runtime diagnostics for each extension when the manager opens.",
        "view.header.title": "Extension Manager",
        "view.header.subtitle": "Bundled extension catalog, enablement controls, permissions, compatibility, diagnostics, and settings.",
        "view.actions.exit": "Exit",
        "view.actions.close": "Close",
        "view.stats.extensions": "Extensions",
        "view.stats.active": "Active",
        "view.stats.disabled": "Disabled",
        "view.stats.incompatible": "Incompatible",
        "view.card.source.bundled": "Bundled",
        "view.card.source.installed": "Installed",
        "view.card.actions.enable": "Enable",
        "view.card.actions.disable": "Disable",
        "view.card.actions.activate": "Activate",
        "view.card.actions.deactivate": "Deactivate",
        "view.card.labels.package": "Package",
        "view.card.labels.version": "Version",
        "view.card.labels.activation": "Activation",
        "view.card.labels.enabled": "Enabled",
        "view.card.labels.permissions": "Permissions",
        "view.card.labels.compatibility": "Compatibility",
        "view.card.labels.health": "Health & diagnostics",
        "view.card.labels.settings": "Settings",
        "view.card.state.enabled": "yes",
        "view.card.state.disabled": "no",
        "view.card.compatibility.ok": "Compatible with the current host, runtime, and theme contract.",
        "view.card.compatibility.error": "One or more compatibility issues were detected.",
        "view.card.health.noDiagnostics": "No runtime diagnostics recorded.",
        "view.card.health.lastError": "Last error",
        "settings.form.state.enabled": "Enabled",
        "settings.form.state.disabled": "Disabled",
        "settings.shortcut.kicker": "Extension manager",
        "settings.shortcut.title": "Extension Manager",
        "settings.shortcut.description": "Open the pane workspace to inspect runtime inventory, compatibility, installed catalog entries, and diagnostics.",
        "settings.stats.extensions": "EXTENSIONS",
        "settings.stats.active": "ACTIVE",
        "settings.stats.installed": "INSTALLED",
        "settings.stats.catalog": "CATALOG",
        "settings.chips.indexeddb": "INDEXEDDB",
        "settings.chips.paneOnly": "Pane only",
        "settings.chips.englishFallback": "English fallback",
        "settings.actions.openManager": "Open manager",
        "diagnostics.ready": "Extension Manager activated successfully."
    }
};

import { extensionManagerLabels } from "../i18n.js";

        "settings.shortcut.title": "Administrador de extensiones",

# @mdwrk/extension-manager

First-party bundled operator console extension for MdWrk.

## Manifest and compatibility

- manifest export: `./manifest`
- bundled entry export: `./bundled`
- compatibility declarations: host API, runtime, app, and theme contract ranges are declared in `src/manifest.ts`
- lifecycle model: bundled first-party extension activated through `@mdwrk/extension-runtime`

## Capabilities

The extension manager visualizes extension runtime state and operator metadata, including:

- bundled and installed extension inventory
- enabled / disabled state
- activation mode and activation status
- compatibility state
- granted and missing capabilities
- runtime diagnostics and last-error state
- schema-driven settings forms for extensions that declare `settingsSchema`

## Settings schema

The package now contributes its own settings section and manifest-backed settings schema.
Those settings cover manager-view defaults such as search, compatibility visibility, and diagnostics display preferences.

Source anchors:

- `src/manifest.ts`
- `src/createExtensionManagerBundledEntry.tsx`

## i18n readiness

The package ships locale labels and locale loaders under:

- `src/i18n.ts`
- `src/locales/en.ts`
- `src/locales/es.ts`

All user-facing manifest/view/settings labels are `I18nLabel` descriptors.

## Lifecycle and host/runtime integration tests

- `tests/extension-manager.test.tsx` exercises the bundled entry, runtime wiring, and extension inventory/state rendering helpers

## Install / configuration guidance

This package is intended for first-party bundling into `apps/client`.
Once active, it becomes the operator console for extension/runtime inventory, compatibility state, diagnostics, and settings visibility.

## API/reference docs

See the generated reference page at:

- `docs/reference/packages/mdwrk-extension-manager.md`
